name: typescript-mastery
description: Phase 2: TypeScript Mastery — Days 8-11. Fundamentals through advanced patterns.

scripts.all: npx ts-node 01-fundamentals.ts && npx ts-node 02-type-system.ts && npx ts-node 03-functions.ts && npx ts-node 04-generics.ts && npx ts-node 05-utility-types.ts && npx ts-node 06-classes-oop.ts && npx ts-node 07-decorators.ts && npx ts-node 08-type-guards.ts && npx ts-node 09-practice.ts
scripts.challenge:all: npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c01-fundamentals.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c02-type-system.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c03-functions.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c04-generics.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c05-utility-types.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c06-classes-oop.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c07-decorators.ts && npx ts-node --transpile-only challenges/c08-type-guards.ts
